issuesFound: Test seed data attempted to create existing user, but signup was called with different email due to timestamp suffix

failures: **DATA ISSUE**: The test tried to seed user with email 'existing.{timestamp}.003@test.com', but the actual API call should use the SAME email to trigger duplicate detection. Test script error - timestamps were added to emails making them unique instead of duplicate.
finalSummary: TEST DATA ISSUE: Test was designed to validate duplicate email rejection, but test execution used unique timestamped emails. The uniqueness constraint exists in DB. This is a TEST SCRIPT error, NOT an implementation issue. User guidance: Remove timestamp suffix from email in duplicate test scenarios.
